Demis Hassabis (DeepMind CEO).text:
I’ve always believed the No.1 application of AI should be to improve human health.

That work started with AlphaFold, and now at 
@IsomorphicLabs
 with the mission to reimagine drug discovery and one day solve all disease!

We are turbocharging that goal with $2.1B in new funding.
Demis Hassabis (DeepMind CEO).summary: AI应用于改善人类健康，获得新融资。

Pieter Levels (独立开发者).text:
By far THE most annoying part of running a business for me is collecting receipts for my accountant

Every month my accountants hounds me for invoices and receipts of every single expense I did, doesn't matter how tiny like $0.50, sometimes also for income (I don't know why)
Pieter Levels (独立开发者).summary: 经营企业中最烦恼的是收集发票

OpenAI (GPT、ChatGPT、DALL-E).text:
parameter golf was a blast.

2,000+ submissions. 1,000+ verified github accounts. ideas ranging from quantization and depth recurrence to TTT LoRA, SSMs, H-nets, JEPA, and more.

autoresearch made iteration dramatically faster — and led to emergent bulletin boards, issue threads,
OpenAI (GPT、ChatGPT、DALL-E).summary: OpenAI举办parameter golf活动，收获丰富成果。

Watch the top five pitches below.
Runway (AI 视频).summary: 祝贺首届Big Pitch Contest优胜者。

Runway (AI 视频).text: Watch all of the winning pitches:

Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).text:
We published new research on how we serve post-trained Qwen3 235B models on NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 Blackwell racks.

GB200 is a major step up over Hopper for high-throughput inference on large MoE models, not just a training platform.
Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).summary: 发布新研究：NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 Blackwell racks上运行Qwen3 235B模型

Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).text: The benchmarks show the gap. NVLS all-reduce latency drops from 586.1µs on H200 to 313.3µs on GB200. In MoE prefill at EP=4, combine falls from 730.1µs to 438.5µs. For decode, GB200 sustains much higher throughput at high token speeds.
Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).summary: NVLS all-reduce性能在H200和GB200间有显著提升。

Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).text:
This NVIDIA remains the strongest platform for large-model inference at scale. Prefill/decode disaggregation, Blackwell-native quantization, custom kernels, and rack-scale NVLink turn GB200 into faster answers lower serving cost.

Read the full paper here
Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).summary: NVIDIA平台强于大规模模型推理

MiniMax (海螺 AI).summary: MiniMax 将参与平台黑客松
